Interview Text:
Hannah Noble:

(part 6)

She and David met when she was 14. She remembers she started having feelings for him. She didn't know what to do because she was dead set on going overseas. She asked, "What are these feelings, God." God said, "I've made you a woman meant to love someone. I've made David for you." God was very patient. He didn't say anything for a while, until later he reiterated "I've chosen him." She sees time and time again why David was partnered with her. She sees how David specifically settles her in the way that she needs because she has a tendency to get too emotionally charged.
Music Video Instructions: Pray this prayer with Chris Martin and friends.
